poolId.description: Stable identifier of the pool or runner group that was scaled in.

poolName.description: Display name of the pool or runner group.

scalingDecisionId.description: Optional identifier for the scaling decision event, useful for correlating with related events.

previousCapacity.description: Optional previous capacity (total instance count) before scaling in.

newCapacity.description: Optional new capacity (total instance count) after scaling in.

idleInstanceCount.description: Number of idle instances at the time of the scale-in operation.

idleInstanceRemovedCount.description: Number of idle instances that were selected for deprovisioning during this scale-in operation.

idleInstanceMaxAgeMinutes.description: Maximum age in minutes of idle instances that were selected for deprovisioning during this scale-in operation.

details.description: Provider-specific metadata for this scaling operation, such as autoscaler version, rule identifiers, or scaling algorithm details.
